package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceDependsOnTransportRequestType() string {
    ruleID := "service_depends_on_transport_request_type"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Service signatures that accept request DTOs declared in handler or transport packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
